positive_prompt: ancient Egypt, vast desert panorama; golden dunes + Nile oasis; pyramids, grand temples, sandstone statues, hieroglyphs; sunlit haze, cinematic glow, warm tones; photoreal, high-detail
negative_prompt: blur/low-res/artifacts, oversaturation, cartoon/3d-render look, duplicates, floating objects
verification_prompt: egipt style, ancient Egypt, vast desert panorama, sharp, photoreal, no blur, no oversaturation, no duplicates, no floating objects
